rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
Register match — Bootstrap voice trio (Godin × Sutherland × Siilasmaa)
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 5: 'do more than a list of ten fail-tweets' (Rory counterintuitive); line 21: 'one human opening the cited cases' (Godin simple); lines 43-62: Sutherland reframing throughout

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 9: 'what was the organisation's missing check?' — genuine unified framing, no softening needed

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences (extended to all student-facing).
No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.

rules_evaluated.evidence: line 9: 'with one question in mind' — invites student thinking, not corrective

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 46: LLM behavior explained inline; line 24: 'citation' earned in context of verification step

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: no fenced prompts in file; rule not applicable
prework is a reading-only framing piece for Module 5; maintainer notes at line 90 document pedagogical intent (calibrate eye, not stoke anxiety)
file targets student cohort, not buyer; student-facing body passes CTO cold-read: direct evidence, no vendor preach

summary: Module 5 prework passes all writing and student-facing checks. Maintainer cut at line 87 protects internal editorial reasoning. Student-facing evidence (lines 3-86) uses Bootstrap voice trio fluidly — Godin simplicity and warmth, Sutherland reframing throughout Why sections, Siilasmaa-shaped forward motion in the call to class. No banned words, no value-prop leak, no jargon-planting violations, no maintainer-vocabulary bleed. Evidence quality is Level 3+ (court record + government audit; practitioner-direct sources). Prework lands as intended: calibrate the eye with two specific cases where both LLM failure AND organisational root cause are on the public record.
